options.text: I prefer Stories because they're temporary and feel more authentic.
I only use Stories to post my bank statements.
Stories are worse because they cost money to post.
I don't use any social media because I'm allergic to screens.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了‘temporary’和‘authentic’这两个与Stories功能相符的关键词。干扰项一是荒谬的用途（银行对账单），二是错误声称收费（Stories免费），三是完全脱离现实（对屏幕过敏）
content.speakerText: What do you think about Instagram Stories compared to regular posts?
content.speakerTextCn: 你觉得Instagram Stories和普通帖子相比怎么样？

content.scenarioHint: 你在和朋友聊天时，想了解对方为什么选择使用Instagram的Stories功能而不是直接发帖

options.text: Why do you use Stories instead of regular posts? I feel like they disappear too fast.
Do you think Stories are better than Reels?
I hate how Stories vanish after 24 hours—don’t you?
Can you show me how to make a Story with music?

content.explanation: 正确答案直接询问对方使用Stories而非常规帖子的原因，符合场景中‘对比平台功能’的学习目标，且使用了‘instead of’清晰表达对比。选项2偏离主题，比较的是Stories和Reels；选项3是表达个人感受而非提问；选项4是请求指导，而非探讨使用动机。

content.scenarioHint: 你注意到同事经常在LinkedIn发职业相关内容，想了解他为何选择用‘Articles’功能而不是简单发状态更新

options.text: Why do you use Articles instead of regular updates? Don’t you think they take too long to write?
Are Articles more popular than Posts on LinkedIn?
I wish I had time to write Articles—they seem so professional.
How do you format your Articles to get more views?

content.explanation: 正确答案使用‘Why do you use...instead of...’结构，精准对应学习目标中的‘对比平台功能’，并自然引出对方的使用动机。选项2是泛泛询问流行度，非个人动机；选项3是自我感慨，非提问；选项4聚焦技术操作，而非使用原因。
